[cron:b3c6834e-c671-4b21-b6d4-0dc9c86f0e84 wiki-learn] жү§иЎҢ ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/wiki-learn-once.sh е№¶е°Ҷиҫ“еҮәиҝҪеҠ еҲ° ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/log.md
Current time: Thursday, April 16th, 2026 - 6:02 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-16 10:02 UTC

content.thinking: Let me read the script first to understand what it does, then execute it and append the output to the log file.

content.text:
#!/bin/bash
# Wiki Auto-Learn еҚ•ж¬Ўжү§иЎҢи„ҡжң¬
# й…ҚеҗҲ cron дҪҝз”ЁпјҢжҜҸе°Ҹж—¶и§ҰеҸ‘дёҖж¬Ў
#
# зӯ–з•Ҙпјҡ
#   1. еҸӘж‘„е…Ҙж–° skillпјҲдёҚеңЁ entities/ дё”дёҚеңЁ blocklist/ дёӯпјү
#   2. blocklist йҳІжӯўиў«еҲ зҡ„ entity йҮҚеӨҚж‘„е…Ҙ
#   3. жңүз©әй—ҙжүҚж·»еҠ пјҢи¶…ж ҮжүҚ prune

WORKSPACE="/home/ai/.openclaw/workspace"
ENTITIES="$WORKSPACE/memory/entities"
RAW="$WORKSPACE/memory/raw"
LOG="$WORKSPACE/memory/log.md"
SKILLS_DIR="$WORKSPACE/skills"
ARCHIVE="$WORKSPACE/memory/entities-archive"
BLOCKLIST="$WORKSPACE/memory/.wiki-learn-blocklist"  # иў«еҲ йҷӨзҡ„ skill еҗҚеҲ—иЎЁ

TARGET=28
BUFFER=3

mkdir -p "$RAW/docs" "$RAW/papers" "$RAW/notes" "$ARCHIVE"

echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] === wiki-learn-once еҗҜеҠЁ ==="

# ===== иҫ…еҠ©пјҡи®Ўз®—еҸҜдёўејғеҲҶж•°пјҲи¶Ҡе°Ҹи¶Ҡе…ҲеҲ пјү=====
disposability_score() {
    local f=$1
    local score
    if grep -q "status: auto-ingested" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
        score=0
    else
        score=500
    fi
    local lines=$(wc -l < "$f")
    echo $((score + lines))
}

# ===== иҫ…еҠ©пјҡд»Һ blocklist еҠ иҪҪе·ІеҲ йҷӨ skill еҗҚпјҲеҺ»йҮҚпјү=====
load_blocklist() {
    [ -f "$BLOCKLIST" ] && sort -u "$BLOCKLIST" || true
}

# ===== иҫ…еҠ©пјҡж·»еҠ  skill еҲ° blocklistпјҲйҳІйҮҚеӨҚпјҢе·ІиҪ¬д№үregexе…ғеӯ—з¬Ұпјү=====
blocklist_add() {
    local name=$1
    # и·іиҝҮе·ІеӯҳеңЁзҡ„пјҲgrep -F еӣәе®ҡеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢйҒҝе…Қnameдёӯе…ғеӯ—з¬Ұе№Іжү°пјү
    grep -qFx -- "$name" "$BLOCKLIST" 2>/dev/null && return
    echo "$name" >> "$BLOCKLIST"
}

# ===== иҫ…еҠ©пјҡзІҫз®ҖеҲ°зӣ®ж Үж•°йҮҸпјҲеҗҢж—¶еҶҷ blocklistпјү=====
prune_to_target() {
    local target=$1
    local current=$(ls "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    local pruned=0

    while [ "$current" -gt "$target" ]; do
        local victim=$(ls "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
            echo "$(disposability_score "$f") $f"
        done | sort -n | head -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-)

        [ -z "$victim" ] || [ ! -f "$victim" ] && break

        local fname=$(basename "$victim" .md)
        mv "$victim" "$ARCHIVE/$(basename $victim)"
        # еҰӮжһң skill зӣ®еҪ•иҝҳеңЁпјҢеҠ е…Ҙ blocklist йҳІжӯўдёӢж¬ЎйҮҚж‘„е…Ҙ
        [ -d "$SKILLS_DIR/$fname" ] && blocklist_add "$fname"
        echo "  рҹ—‘  зІҫз®Җ: $fname"
        pruned=$((pruned + 1))
        current=$(ls "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    done

    [ "$pruned" -gt 0 ] && echo "  рҹ”Ә зІҫз®Җе®ҢжҲҗ: з§»еҮә $pruned дёӘ"
}

# ===== 1. еҠ иҪҪ blocklistпјҲзІҫзЎ®еҢ№й…ҚпјҢз”Ёж•°з»„йҒҝе…ҚеӯҗдёІиҜҜеҢ№й…Қпјү=====
BLOCKED_NAMES=($(load_blocklist))
echo "  рҹҡ« blocklist: ${BLOCKED_NAMES[*]:-ж— }"

# ===== 2. жЈҖжҹҘз©әй—ҙ =====
CURRENT=$(ls "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
AVAILABLE=$((TARGET + BUFFER - CURRENT))
echo "  рҹ“Ҡ еҪ“еүҚ $CURRENT / зӣ®ж Ү $TARGET / еҸҜж–°еўһ $AVAILABLE"

# ===== 3. жү«жҸҸ skills/пјҢжҢүз©әй—ҙж·»еҠ пјҲжҺ’йҷӨ blocklistпјү=====
NEW_ENTITIES=0
SKIPPED_SPACE=0
SKIPPED_BLOCK=0
for skill in "$SKILLS_DIR"/*/; do
    [ -d "$skill" ] || continue
    name=$(basename "$skill")

    # е·ІеңЁ entities/ дёӯеҲҷи·іиҝҮ
    [ -f "$ENTITIES/${name}.md" ] && continue

    # еңЁ blocklist дёӯеҲҷи·іиҝҮпјҲжӣҫиў«еҲ йҷӨпјҢдёҚйҮҚж‘„е…ҘпјҢзІҫзЎ®еҢ№й…Қпјү
    is_blocked=false
    for blocked in "${BLOCKED_NAMES[@]}"; do
        [ "$name" = "$blocked" ] && is_blocked=true && break
    done
    if $is_blocked; then
        SKIPPED_BLOCK=$((SKIPPED_BLOCK + 1))
        continue
    fi

    # з©әй—ҙдёҚи¶іеҲҷи·іиҝҮ
    if [ "$AVAILABLE" -le 0 ]; then
        SKIPPED_SPACE=$((SKIPPED_SPACE + 1))
        continue
    fi

    cat > "$ENTITIES/${name}.md" << EOF
---
title: $name
type: skill
status: auto-ingested
last_updated: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d')
tags: [skill, auto]
---

# $name

> иҮӘеҠЁд»Һ skills/ зӣ®еҪ•ж‘„е…Ҙ

## жқҘжәҗ

- зұ»еһӢ: skill
- и·Ҝеҫ„: skills/$name
- ж‘„е…Ҙж—¶й—ҙ: $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")

## зӣёе…ійЎөйқў

- [[skills]] - жҠҖиғҪжё…еҚ•
- [[ai-usage]] - AI дҪҝз”Ёж–№ејҸ
EOF
    echo "  рҹ“Ҙ ж–°жҠҖиғҪе®һдҪ“йЎө: $name"
    NEW_ENTITIES=$((NEW_ENTITIES + 1))
    AVAILABLE=$((AVAILABLE - 1))
done

[ "$SKIPPED_BLOCK" -gt 0 ] && echo "  рҹҡ« и·іиҝҮ(blocklist): $SKIPPED_BLOCK дёӘ"
[ "$SKIPPED_SPACE" -gt 0 ] && echo "  вҸӯ  и·іиҝҮ(з©әй—ҙдёҚи¶і): $SKIPPED_SPACE дёӘ"

# жү«жҸҸ docs/ дҪңдёә Raw Sources
DOCS_COUNT=$(ls "$WORKSPACE/docs"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "  рҹ“Ӯ Raw Sources: docs/$DOCS_COUNT"

# ===== 4. Lint: жӯ»й“ҫжЈҖжҹҘдёҺдҝ®еӨҚ =====
FIXED=0
for link in $(grep -roh '\[\[[a-z0-9-]*\]\]' "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | sed 's/\[\[//;s/\]\]//g' | sort -u); do
    if [ ! -f "$ENTITIES/${link}.md" ]; then
        sed -i "s/\[\[$link\]\]//g" "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null
        FIXED=$((FIXED + 1))
    fi
done
[ "$FIXED" -gt 0 ] && echo "  рҹ”§ дҝ®еӨҚжӯ»й“ҫ: $FIXED дёӘ"

# ===== 5. и¶…ж Үжё…зҗҶ =====
CURRENT=$(ls "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
if [ "$CURRENT" -gt $((TARGET + BUFFER)) ]; then
    echo "  рҹ”Ә и¶…ж Үжё…зҗҶ: еҪ“еүҚ $CURRENTпјҢзІҫз®ҖеҲ° $TARGET"
    prune_to_target "$TARGET"
fi

# ===== 6. и®°еҪ• log =====
ENTITY_COUNT=$(ls "$ENTITIES"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "## [$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')] wiki-learn | entities:$ENTITY_COUNT | new:$NEW_ENTITIES | skip(block):$SKIPPED_BLOCK | skip(space):$SKIPPED_SPACE | fixed:$FIXED" >> "$LOG"

echo "  вң… entities:$ENTITY_COUNT | new:$NEW_ENTITIES"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] === wiki-learn-once е®ҢжҲҗ ==="

content.thinking:
The script is a wiki learning/auto-ingestion script that:
1. Maintains a set of entity files in memory/entities
2. Ingests new skills from the skills/ directory
3. Has a blocklist to prevent re-ingestion of deleted skills
4. Prunes to target of 28 entities with a buffer of 3
5. Checks and fixes dead wiki links
6. Logs its activity to memory/log.md

Let me run it and append output to the log.

content.text:
е®ҢжҲҗгҖӮжү§иЎҢж‘ҳиҰҒпјҡ

- **entities**: 41 вҶ’ 28пјҲз§»еҮә 13 дёӘи¶…йҫ„/дҪҺд»·еҖје®һдҪ“пјү
- **ж–°ж‘„е…Ҙ**: 0пјҲз©әй—ҙдёҚи¶іпјҢи·іиҝҮ 12 дёӘпјү
- **blocklist и·іиҝҮ**: 5 дёӘ
- **Raw Sources**: docs/9
